title: The Traitor Inside Egghead
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Red Hair Pirates, Unknown person #11, Shanks, Unknown person #12 as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
scene: The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Guess I lost track of time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...catching up with everyone.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The enemy's gonna be pissed at you for keepin' them waiting.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Can't be helped when you suddenly...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GYA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA HA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come across old friends you thought were dead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...he's the only one they're mad at?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Let's set sail!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd never let this island become a warzone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So we're really doing this, chief?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't wanna cause any major trouble here...

dialogue.speaker: Red Hair Pirates
dialogue.text: You're going out there to fight, shanks?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Dorry, Brogy. Can you lend me a hand?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: OH!! He's so dreamy!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Before that, can you go check some- thing for me, rockstar?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hm? You have a message for Captain Kid...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This island is actually Elbaf, the home of the most prideful warriors around!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GE GYA GYA GYA!! Let's do it, Red Hair!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: yeah, tell him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He has a choice...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He can either hand over his lode poneglyph rubbings and Scram...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...or he can risk fighting me!!

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: WAR-LAND ELBAF, NEW WORLD

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those ships on the horizon are all his...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Including the ones lagging behind...

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: THEY'RE ALLIES OF THE RED-HAIRED PIRATES!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone of them seems like a big shot...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And they're all sworn to the Emperor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Last time, it was completely one-sided...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: THEY TOOK YOUR ARM...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Before we even got a glimpse of red hair himself! FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA

summary: This part advances the Egghead Betrayal through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
